rules.singleImageRule: Draw as a single full image unless the manifest explicitly declares a supported tileset or sprite_sheet type.
rules.tilesetRule: Slice only when type is tileset, tileSize is 16 or 32, and columns and rows are explicit numbers.
rules.spriteSheetRule: Slice only when type is sprite_sheet, frameWidth and frameHeight are explicit numbers, and animations defines explicit frame order.
rules.currentAssetDefault: All current PNGs are single_image because no explicit tile or animation metadata has been provided.
